featureName: Chrome Extension Bridge (Live Bookmarks + Browser History)
planningOnlyJustification: Planning complete (5 scopes, 21 scenarios, design ready). Spec 060 dependency Scopes 1+2 SHIPPED. Flipped to full-delivery 2026-05-28 to unblock bubbles.implement for Scopes 1+2.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Scope 1 server-side surface shipped: SST extension.ingest.* keys + ExtensionIngestConfig.Validate (fail-loud, 6 fields); POST /v1/connectors/extension/ingest handler enforcing 413/422/400 transport caps + per-item validation + dedup-then-publish via the new DedupStore seam; router mount inside bearerAuthMiddleware gated by auth.RequireScope("extension:bookmarks", "extension:history") (AND-semantics per spec 060). All Go unit suites green. Live-stack e2e-api rows SCN-058-001..005 deferred pending a real extension client (Scope 3) or a curl-driven server-side fixture — routed to bubbles.plan.

Scope 2 server dedup contract shipped: migration 040_raw_ingest_dedup.sql; ComputeDedupKey (SHA-256 over url+\x00+content_type+\x00+device+\x00+bucket) with deterministic + per-tuple-component + boundary-collision tests; PostgresDedupStore.ResolveOrPublish (UPDATE-first for collision, INSERT...ON CONFLICT with xmax=0 race-loss detection); handler retrofit calls ResolveOrPublish so PublishRawArtifact is skipped on dedup; bookmark bucket fixed at 0; history window clamped [60, 86400] with SST fallback. Live Postgres integration row deferred (Scope 3/5 depends).

Scope 3 Chrome MV3 extension shipped: extensions/chrome-bridge/ new directory with full design §4.1 module layout (TypeScript + esbuild + vitest). MV3 manifest with minimum permissions [bookmarks, history, storage, alarms] and restrictive CSP. Background SW registers all bookmark+history listeners at top level and a 1-min chrome.alarms wake. Privacy filter (cap 64) drops denied URLs before enqueue, dwell gate filters short history visits, IndexedDB WAL persists across SW eviction (fake-indexeddb proves it), exponential backoff matches design §4.2 with 24h dead-letter cap, transport mapping covers 401/403/400/413/422/5xx/network. Options page masks bearer token by default and runs every §4.4 validator. Zero-defaults honored throughout (no compiled-in URL/token/device-id). vitest 39/39 green, tsc clean, esbuild produces working dist/. Three e2e-ui DoD rows (Playwright bookmark roundtrip, broader e2e-ui regression, e2e tier of SCN-058-010..015) deferred per F-057-V-001 (no Playwright harness in repo) — routed to bubbles.plan.

Scope 4 build/release wiring shipped: scripts/commands/build-chrome-bridge.sh wraps the npm + esbuild toolchain and emits a byte-reproducible zip + .sha256 (SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH from git, sorted find, zip -X, normalized touch mtimes). smackerel.sh build --extension chrome-bridge dispatches to the script via a new --extension <name> sub-arm; unknown extension targets are rejected fail-loud. .github/workflows/build.yml extended with a build-chrome-bridge job that runs after build-images on the same source SHA, cosign sign-blob keyless (Rekor) over the zip, uploads zip/.sha256/.sig as workflow artifacts and (on tag push) attaches to GitHub Release; publish-build-manifest downloads the chrome-bridge sha artifact and writes a chromeBridge:{artifact, zipSha256, signature, signatureScheme, transparencyLog, specReference} block into build-manifest-<sourceSha>.yaml. Two-run reproducibility executed locally (same SHA-256 7d1b46...256bd). Workflow contract tests (BuildWorkflow|VulnGate|BundleHash) all pass. cosign verify-blob against a released artifact and the persistent Regression_BuildManifestRecordsZipSHA256 contract test deferred — routed to bubbles.plan.

Scope 5 operator docs + admin devices view shipped: new Go package internal/api/admin/extensiondevices/ with Handler + PostgresStore (aggregates raw_ingest_dedup by (owner_user_id, source_device_id), 30-day visit count via FILTER, deterministic sort, [] empty-list contract). Unit suite 7/7 green covering admin-sees-all, non-admin-scoped-to-own (adversarial twin), 401 path, method matrix, store-error 500, fail-loud constructor, empty-array vs null. docs/Operations.md adds Chrome Extension Bridge Sideload Workflow (8-step runbook with verbatim cosign verify-blob invocation, options-page setup, badge state matrix, OQ-DSN-2/OQ-DSN-3/Chrome-Sync caveats). docs/API.md adds Chrome Extension Bridge Ingestion and Admin Devices View sections plus a Change Notes row. Zero stale /v1/extensions/ references. Deferred: HTMX admin page, router mount in internal/api/router.go (shared gap with Scope 1's ingest route), live-stack e2e regression, regression-baseline-guard registration — all routed to bubbles.plan.

executionHistory.summary: Authored design.md covering architecture (MV3 extension at extensions/chrome-bridge/, server endpoint POST /v1/connectors/extension/ingest), wire schema bound to connector.RawArtifact with enumerated Metadata keys, server-authoritative dedup table, spec 044 bearer auth reuse. Flagged OQ-DSN-1 (spec 044 scope claim amendment) as blocking dependency; routing packet captured in §12.1.

Authored scopes.md with 5 sequential vertical-slice scopes (server endpoint + SST, server dedup, MV3 extension skeleton, build/release wiring, operator docs + devices view). Authored scenario-manifest.json with 21 stable SCN-058-NNN contracts mapped to live tests. Initialized report.md and uservalidation.md templates. Consumed shipped spec 060 RequireScope primitive (Scopes 1+2 SHIPPED — OQ-DSN-1 resolved upstream); wire scope tuple is auth.RequireScope("extension:bookmarks", "extension:history") with AND-semantics per design §1.1 and §5.1. SST-zero-defaults preserved; Build-Once Deploy-Many honored (signed-zip via cosign keyless, build-manifest entry). Adversarial regression rows planned for each high-risk scope (AND-semantics exact-match, Chrome-Sync device-id, boundary-collision separator hygiene, corrupted-IndexedDB-row drainer resilience).

scopeProgress.name: Server Ingest Endpoint + SST Config + Scope-Gated Mount
Server Dedup Table + Keyer + Upsert Path
Chrome MV3 Extension Skeleton + Background WAL + Options Page

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Planning complete (bubbles.plan, 2026-05-28). 5 scopes, 21 SCN contracts. Spec 060 Scopes 1+2 dependency SHIPPED — OQ-DSN-1 resolved.
